## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss and realign on content strategy and deliverables for Tribe AI's engagement with GrowthX (fwd.digital).](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Current content quality and strategy not meeting Tribe AI's expectations](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [GrowthX to reset approach, focusing on high-quality, authoritative content](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Need for clearer goals, KPIs, and content direction (thought leadership vs. organic growth)](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)
  - [Potential adjustment to engagement terms given current performance](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Topics

### Current Challenges and Realignment

  - [Content quality not meeting expectations, comparable to ChatGPT output](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=530.0)
  - [Lack of clear direction on content strategy (thought leadership vs. organic growth)](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=221.0)
  - [Need for better alignment on outcomes and KPIs](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=185.0)
  - [Jaclyn expressed concern over limited deliverables (only one published piece) despite ongoing engagement](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=1486.0)

### Proposed Solutions

  - [Implement a singular, clear outcome each week](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=194.0)
  - [Improve managing of managers to ensure better content quality](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=208.0)
  - [Utilize Jess's expertise in brand-conscious content creation](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=574.0)
  - [Focus on templatized, high-quality content clusters (e.g., comparison articles)](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Use authoritative sources and research papers as content foundations](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=395.0)

### Success Stories and Strategies

  - [Knapsack: Aggressive development of content clusters for long-tail keywords](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=429.0)
  - [Hims: Drug comparison articles with templatized sections](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=739.0)
  - [Prompt Guard: Leveraging authoritative papers (e.g., OWASP) for security-related content](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

### Next Steps and Recalibration

  - [GrowthX to regroup internally and develop a revised plan](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [Provide examples of "great" content to set the quality bar](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Consider adjusting engagement terms or payment structure](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Set a constrained time period for GrowthX to demonstrate improved performance](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=1516.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to meet with Jess to download meeting insights and develop new strategy](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=1256.0)
  - [GrowthX to send a revised plan and Loom video early next week](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Tribe AI to provide examples of high-quality content for reference](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)
  - [Discuss potential adjustments to engagement terms or timeline](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=1578.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to review new strategy and plan](https://fathom.video/share/VmPkqAxps5NyhPzYbxZZWNYdKVpDh3PC?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
